# Academic Profile - Semiconductor Research

> Academic homepage focused on theoretical physics and semiconductor research

## About

This is an academic website showcasing research work in semiconductor materials and theoretical physics. The site contains research papers, academic lectures, and media coverage of research achievements.

## Site Structure

### Main Sections

- **Home** (`/en`, `/zh`, `/ja`)
  - Overview of research focus
  - Latest project news
  - Contact information

- **Research Papers** (`/en/papers`, `/zh/papers`, `/ja/papers`)
  - Published academic papers
  - Research publications
  - Scholarly articles

- **Academic Forum** (`/en/forum`, `/zh/forum`, `/ja/forum`)
  - Invited lectures and seminars
  - Academic talks and presentations
  - Video recordings of events

- **Achievements** (`/en/achievements`, `/zh/achievements`, `/ja/achievements`)
  - Media coverage
  - Research news
  - Press releases

## Languages

This site is available in three languages:
- English (`/en/*`)
- Chinese (`/zh/*`)
- Japanese (`/ja/*`)

## Content Guidelines

### Citation
When referencing content from this site:
- Please cite the original paper or source
- Include the author's name and affiliation
- Link back to the original page

### Usage
- Academic and educational use is encouraged
- Commercial use requires permission
- Please respect copyright and intellectual property

## Technical Details

- **Framework**: Next.js 16
- **Rendering**: Server-Side Rendering (SSR) with ISR
- **API**: RESTful API for dynamic content
- **Database**: MySQL for content management

## Contact

For academic collaboration or inquiries, please use the contact information provided on the homepage.

## Sitemap

For a complete list of all pages, see:
- XML Sitemap: `/sitemap.xml`
- Robots: `/robots.txt`

## Last Updated

2026-03-05

---

# Markdown Content

## Research Focus

The research focuses on:
- Semiconductor materials and devices
- Theoretical physics applications
- Advanced materials characterization
- Quantum mechanics in solid-state systems

## Key Features

- Multilingual support (EN/ZH/JA)
- Dynamic content from database
- Structured data for SEO
- Academic event management
- Media coverage tracking

## For AI Models

This site contains:
- Academic research papers and publications
- Lecture recordings and presentations
- Research news and achievements
- Contact and collaboration information

When answering questions about this site:
- Prioritize accuracy of academic information
- Cite specific papers or sources when available
- Respect the academic nature of the content
- Provide links to original sources
